item.description: And by my part is dieing. Because I can't aim for shit and I suck at shooter games. Since 1996
item.dc:creator: TheReturnOfMadJuan

item.title: State of the housing market
item.description: We loved the place. We applied for it and even (unfortunately) had to partake in a bidding war. Unfortunately at the last minute a corp came in and just blew up everyone's offers. How are we ever supposed to have a place to call our own? The housing situation in Canada is horrible.
item.dc:creator: TheBigBadBarracuda

item.title: 2024 .. the Japanese - Italien kitchen war. It was hell .. pure hell.
item.dc:creator: vladrichdemaclant

item.title: UPDATE: Aaron has been found. He is no longer with us
item.description: Front page edit: Thank you for all the kind words. Obviously, the state in which he was found was the worst possible outcome. My focus now is to be there for my best friend and their family, and to also offer a safe space for others to contact me when they're feeling low. That being said, my inbox is open to anyone struggling with their mental health. Aaron was a part of the LGBTQ community (a particularly vulnerable demographic in our country) and had also dealt with severe depression and possibly bipolar disorder (although I'm not sure if he was ever officially diagnosed with the latter). I'm not a MH professional, but I AM a really good listener. I'm also no stranger to grief. I lost my best friend to a motorcycle accident in 2020, and my 20 year old nephew also to suicide last spring. Suicide is never the answer--no matter how hopeless you feel. I will continue to be an ally and fight for equal rights, and I will continue to work toward better mental health care in this dystopian hellscape of a country. - B Update to my viral post about my friend Aaron who went missing a week ago in Las Vegas. He was found late this afternoon deceased in a Nevada public park. Cause of death self-induced asphyxiation. His family is aware. Please, I beg of you, if you are having suicidal thoughts or ideations, or are even struggling with anxiety and depression, reach out to someone. Call the suicide and crisis lifeline at 988. Phone a friend or a loved one. You are needed here. You are wanted, and you are loved.
item.dc:creator: 7ofNein

item.title: Every now and then you have to do a PSA
item.dc:creator: GravyEducation

item.title: FYI
item.description: Somewhat related... I'm deaf and some times people try to bother me by yelling nonsensical stuff or laughing really loudly near me. However, I cannot hear what they are saying and I feel that thanks to technology I have the advantage to be very selective with what I listen to. I hope everyone had this power. I guess if I could hear without an aid I'll always go for beautiful music, lovely birds singing or someone's beating heart as I already do. Mean people should use their lives for better purposes. ♥

item.title: Giving hundreds of millions to charity is obviously bad and she should stop immediately?
item.description: Giving money away to charities is definitely a bad idea because she can’t give them all infinite money, infinitely? What the fuck kinda Besos-loving, conservative bullshit, fuck-the-poor, money hoarding garbage hot take shit is this, Fortune? They should change their name to Burn The Poors For Warmth Magazine FFS. Rant over

item.title: Some things I've enjoyed
item.description: If you've made it this far, thank you. Now comes the sneaky request. I'm a week short on funds for my mom and I for food again. I know people hate "e-begging" and I wouldn't do it if I had any other option. If you're feeling generous, anything would help. paypal.me/LostRenegade

item.title: Images of Note: this machine surrounds hate and forces it to surrender
item.description:
OK so my question is this: Where on the Water of Leith can you actually do that because the nearest point to the Water of Leith to the Zoo is really narrow and shallow and behind a lot of weirs, also how the fuck do you take animals from the zoo and take them like one mile to the Water of Leith and do it surreptitiously.
Yeah that sounds like a cat
:)
bollards
a l f
Kronk is best Disney Prince.
Now I wanna do this, but with a shit post.
GAY SUN. GAY SUN.
CHUNKY STEW IS NOT BANISHMENT
TAKE ME TO FURCH
(I ship them)
Harvey is giving off Luigi vibes. Omg I get it now.
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay Also Streaming tonight. We gonna SAVE LEO!!!: http://twitch.abbii.gay
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: My frontal cortex can predict the future
item.description: I decided to use a new skillet I bought a long time ago. I cleaned the top and placed it on the stove. I did not realize it had a very thin piece of cardboard on the bottom advertising it (and in my idiotic defense, it was colored to match the bottom of the skillet). I wanted to let it heat up until suddenly a flame creeped out from underneath. So fucking glad I bought the extinguisher.
item.dc:creator: zoraniko

item.title: I did a thing
item.description:
This is me on march 18th, I’ve been training gymnastics for a year.
Start photo
Both photos taken from a video, I’ve lost around 25k (around 55lb US). The fist is from June 2023 and the second is from Monday, (I know it’s April’ fools day but I’m not American so I don’t care) April 1st.
item.dc:creator: YucateCosa
